title: Records to be produced to Commissioner
content:
For the purposes of section 37, the Commissioner may, either 
by notice in writing served by registered post or by notice in the 
Gazette, require any employer or class of employers to send to him 
all or any records of sickness days in respect of any period not 
exceeding 2 years preceding the date of the notice.
Last updated date
23.5.2025
Employment Ordinance
Part VII	
7-38
Section 38	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
Part VIII
Holidays with Pay
(Part VIII added 39 of 1973 s. 5. Format changes—E.R. 2 of 2012)
